mapper.select:
select u.id, u.account, u.avatar, u.email, u.status, u.member_time as memberTime, u.create_time as createTime, r.name as roleName from sys_user u left join sys_user_role ur on u.id = ur.user_id and ur.is_deleted = 0 left join sys_role r on ur.role_id = r.id and r.is_deleted = 0 where u.is_deleted = 0
and u.account like concat('%', #{account}, '%')
and r.name = #{roleName}
and date_format(u.create_time,'%Y%m%d') >= date_format(#{beginCreateTime},'%Y%m%d')
and date_format(u.create_time,'%Y%m%d') <= date_format(#{endCreateTime},'%Y%m%d')
and date_format(u.member_time,'%Y%m%d') >= date_format(#{beginCreateTime},'%Y%m%d')
and date_format(u.member_time,'%Y%m%d') <= date_format(#{endMemberTime},'%Y%m%d')
order by u.create_time desc
limit #{pageNum}, #{pageSize}

select count(*) from sys_user u left join sys_user_role ur on u.id = ur.user_id and ur.is_deleted = 0 left join sys_role r on ur.role_id = r.id and r.is_deleted = 0 where u.is_deleted = 0
and u.account like concat('%', #{account}, '%')
and r.name = #{roleName}
and date_format(u.create_time,'%Y%m%d') >= date_format(#{beginCreateTime},'%Y%m%d')
and date_format(u.create_time,'%Y%m%d') <= date_format(#{endCreateTime},'%Y%m%d')
and date_format(u.member_time,'%Y%m%d') >= date_format(#{beginMemberTime},'%Y%m%d')
and date_format(u.member_time,'%Y%m%d') <= date_format(#{endMemberTime},'%Y%m%d')
select * from sys_role where name = #{roleName} and is_deleted = 0

SELECT CURDATE() - INTERVAL (n) DAY AS date, COALESCE(COUNT(u.id), 0) AS count FROM (SELECT 0 AS n UNION ALL SELECT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 3 UNION ALL SELECT 4 UNION ALL SELECT 5 UNION ALL SELECT 6) numbers LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON DATE(u.create_time) = CURDATE() - INTERVAL n DAY GROUP BY date ORDER BY date;
